headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Incyte (INCY) After A 60% One-Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Incyte at around US$94.65 still offers value or has already run too far, you are not alone. That question is exactly what this article will unpack. The stock has returned 60.0% over the past year, while the year to date move sits at a 6.7% decline. Shorter term returns of a 3.2% decline over 7 days and a 2.6% move over 30 days hint at shifting sentiment. Recent attention on Incyte has focused on its position within the pharmaceuticals and biotech space and how...
